label: Message Type

backend.evidence: MessageHeader.message_type stores the message type value exported to /hl7:MCCI_IN200100UV01/hl7:name/@displayName.

frontend.evidence: Strict frontend inventory did not find a case-form input for this mapped frontend key; the value lives in the case form schema and is not exposed as an input.

action: Add a case-form input, or reclassify as not_applicable if the batch/message envelope is generated at transmission.
notes: Batch/message envelope element; SectionC3 renders only N.1.5, N.2.r.1, N.2.r.2 and N.2.r.3 as editable message header inputs.

label: Message Identifier

frontend.evidence: Strict frontend input inventory extracts messageHeader.messageNumber from the case-form section source.

notes: SectionC3 renders this input as messageHeader.messageNumber, which is correct for N.2.r.1 (Message Identifier), but tags it fieldNumber N.1.2 (Batch Number) in the UI label — a frontend labelling bug, not a mapping error.

backend.evidence: MessageHeader.message_sender_identifier stores N.2.r.2; validation/case/sections/n.rs validates ICH.N.2.r.2.REQUIRED against this field.

frontend.evidence: Strict frontend input inventory extracts messageHeader.messageSenderIdentifier from the case-form section source.

backend.evidence: MessageHeader.message_receiver_identifier stores N.2.r.3; validation/case/sections/n.rs validates ICH.N.2.r.3.REQUIRED against this field.

frontend.evidence: Strict frontend input inventory extracts messageHeader.messageReceiverIdentifier from the case-form section source.
